examples: The Veddahs have Animist and Buddhist practices.
To the animist Kondh tribes, the mountain is more than the place where they live: it is their god.
With the decline in animist beliefs the frogs eyes fell out of fashion, but the Naxi still call the cape by its original name: frog-eye goatskin.
Expect to meet the semi-nomadic Merak people, who hold deep animist beliefs and make their living herding sheep.
Local legend has it that Rhumsiki was settled by animist peoples from the northern deserts who fled the advance of Islam in the 18th century.
